prompt: Find the TaskProfile interface in the codebase, count how many fields it has, then search for all places where a TaskProfile is constructed (look for object literals with 'type' and 'complexity' fields)
List all packages in the monorepo, then for each package read its package.json and tell me which packages depend on @brainst0rm/shared

Trace the flow of a user message through the system: find where user input enters (CLI), how it gets to the agent loop, how the router classifies it, and how streamText is called. Reference specific files and line numbers.
Find all the routing strategies, read each one, and rank them by how many lines of code they contain (most to least)
Find all error classes defined in the codebase, list them with their file locations, and explain the error hierarchy
Read the turbo.json configuration, then check 3 different package.json files to verify they all have the expected scripts (build, test, dev, typecheck) that turbo expects
Find all places where pino logger is used (createLogger calls), list the logger names, and check if there's a central logger configuration
Find the cost tracking system: where costs are recorded, where they're queried, and what budget enforcement exists. Give me file paths and brief descriptions.
Map the dependency graph of packages: for each of the 13 packages, list what other @brainst0rm/* packages it depends on
Find the session management code, understand how sessions are created/resumed/forked, and tell me what database tables are involved
